mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite_job (user_id, job_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{jobId}, NOW())
mapper.sql: FROM favorite_job f INNER JOIN job j ON j.id = f.job_id INNER JOIN subsidiary_company s ON s.id = j.subsidiary_id INNER JOIN job_category jc ON jc.id = j.job_category_id INNER JOIN region_province rp ON rp.code = j.province_code INNER JOIN region_city rc ON rc.code = j.city_code
mapper.select:
SELECT f.id AS id, j.id AS jobId, j.title AS title, j.company AS company, j.city AS city, j.salary_min AS salaryMin, j.salary_max AS salaryMax, j.status AS status, s.group_name AS groupName, s.id AS subsidiaryId, s.subsidiary_name AS subsidiaryName, s.short_name AS shortName, j.business_line AS businessLine, jc.id AS jobCategoryId, jc.category_name AS categoryName, rp.code AS provinceCode, rp.name AS provinceName, rc.code AS cityCode, rc.name AS cityName, j.work_mode AS workMode, j.duration_type AS durationType, j.publish_time AS publishTime, f.create_time AS favoriteTime
ORDER BY f.create_time DESC, f.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
